name: betterbacks-ai
description: Turns the Claude Code & Codex loading spinner into a tiny ad marketplace. You keep 90% of the revenue.

commands.title: Betterbacks: Show me the money (simulate an agent run)
Betterbacks: Open the currently shown ad

betterbacks.enabled.description: Show sponsored lines in the spinner and earn while you wait.

betterbacks.revenueShare.description: Your cut of ad revenue. Betterbacks pays 90% — the better split.

betterbacks.grossCpm.description: Effective gross revenue per 1,000 five-second impressions (USD), before your share.

betterbacks.autoShowOnTerminal.description: Automatically show a sponsored line while an integrated terminal is focused (where your agent runs).

betterbacks.serverUrl.description: Betterbacks API base URL (e.g. https://api.betterbacks.ai). When set, ads come from the live auction and your earnings settle for real. Leave empty for offline/demo mode.

scripts.lint: node -c extension.js && node -c src/adapters/index.js && node -c src/adapters/statusBar.js && echo "syntax ok"
